rules: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Show the product straight-on on a pure white background with the primary shade visible and packaging closed, and ensure tools show the working end.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image on pure white with the primary shade visible, packaging closed, and tool working end shown where applicable.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front, In Pack
silo_front_in_pack.guidance: Show the complete product packaging from a straight-on, front-facing angle. Shoot on white with no shadow or keystoning.
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on in-pack front silo image showing the complete packaging clearly on white.

silo_detail.label: Silo, Detail
silo_detail.guidance: Show a macro close-up of the product formula, pigment, texture, or detail to highlight sensory quality, color payoff, texture, or consistency.
silo_detail.recommendation: Add a detail image showing product texture, pigment, formula, color payoff, or working detail.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in a realistic, natural setting that reflects everyday use with the product as the focal point and minimal distraction.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in realistic everyday use with minimal distraction.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic showing product size clearly.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight primary product benefits, performance, ingredient, shade range, fragrance notes, hair care benefits, nail finish, tool performance, or product family using clean graphic callouts.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a clean feature graphic highlighting key product benefits, performance, ingredient, shade range, or product family.

results_graphic.label: Results Graphic
results_graphic.guidance: Show the product applied to a model or show before-and-after results using consistent lighting, accurate representation, and appropriate disclaimers.
results_graphic.recommendation: Add a results graphic showing product effect, finish, or before-and-after results with consistent lighting and disclaimers where needed.

swatch_graphic.label: Swatch Graphic
swatch_graphic.guidance: Show color applied to a model with diverse skin tones, with multiple shades shown where applicable.
swatch_graphic.recommendation: Add a swatch graphic showing shade/color application on diverse skin tones where applicable.

graphic_ingredients.label: Graphics, Ingredients
graphic_ingredients.guidance: Use the ingredient panel directly from the packaging artwork to ensure clear and legible text.
graphic_ingredients.recommendation: Add a clear ingredients graphic pulled directly from packaging artwork.

additional_recommendations: Shade Range Chart: Display all available shades in a labeled swatch chart organized by tone family.
Before & After: Show visible results using a before-and-after comparison with consistent conditions and appropriate disclaimers.
Application Tutorial: Provide a simple step graphic showing how to apply the product for best results.
Ingredient Story: Highlight key ingredients with brief explanations of their benefit in a clean graphic format.
Collection Image: Show the full product range or collection in a styled group arrangement.
notes: Preserve the repeated feature_graphic slot because the source page shows two separate feature graphics.
One feature graphic highlights primary makeup benefits or tool performance using clean callout graphics.
The second feature graphic displays all shades in a swatch lineup with labels and shows application on a range of skin undertones where possible.
Silo Detail should show a macro close-up of formula, pigment, or texture on skin or a palette to highlight sensory quality and color payoff.

Collection Image: Show the full product range or collection in a styled group arrangement.

Results graphic should show before-and-after results using consistent lighting and include a results disclaimer.
Silo Detail should show a close-up of the product formula such as serum, cream, or gel to highlight texture and consistency.

The second feature graphic shows available sizes or product family in a clean grouped arrangement with size callouts.
Source guide notes Hair Dryer Stands can remain in Hair if preferred, but also lists it on this page. Preserve it here as listed.
